# CMTimeMappingMakeFromDictionary(_:)

**Function**

Creates a time mapping from a dictionary representation.

## Declaration

```swift
func CMTimeMappingMakeFromDictionary(_ dictionaryRepresentation: CFDictionary) -> CMTimeMapping
```

## Parameters

- **dictionaryRepresentation**: A dictionary representation of a time mapping that you previously created by calling the [doc://com.apple.coremedia/documentation/CoreMedia/CMTimeMappingCopyAsDictionary(_:allocator:)] function.

## Return Value

A new time mapping.

## Discussion

If the dictionary you provide doesn’t have the requisite keyed values, the system returns an invalid time mapping.

## Creating Time Mappings

- **CMTimeMappingMake(source:target:)**: Creates a time mapping with a source and target time range.
- **CMTimeMappingMakeEmpty(target:)**: Creates a valid time mapping with an empty source.
